title: WritableSecretStore backends: add inventory::submit! registration
description:
Add inventory::submit! calls in each of the 9 backends that implement WritableSecretStore, registering them as WritableBackendRegistration instances.

What: Enable from_uri_writable to discover writable backends at runtime via inventory iteration.

Backends covered (9):
- secretx-file
- secretx-aws-sm
- secretx-aws-ssm
- secretx-azure-kv
- secretx-doppler
- secretx-gcp-sm
- secretx-hashicorp-vault
- secretx-keyring
- secretx-pkcs11

Algorithm for each backend crate's src/lib.rs:
1. Add use secretx_core::WritableBackendRegistration; at top
2. At module level, add:
   inventory::submit!(WritableBackendRegistration {
       name: <BACKEND_NAME_STR>,
       factory: |uri: &str| {
           <BackendStruct>::from_uri(uri).map(|b| Arc::new(b) as Arc<dyn secretx_core::WritableSecretStore>)
       },
   });
3. Same backend name strings as SecretStore registration (they must match exactly)

Defensive programming rules:
- Factory closure must use the same URI string
- Cast must be: Arc::new(b) as Arc<dyn WritableSecretStore>
- No unwrap() in factory
- Never log URI content
- env and bitwarden must NOT have WritableBackendRegistration — they are read-only

Agent team: standard (Researcher + Implementer + Tester + Validator)
